layerGraph.description: Directed acyclic layer graph for @dzupagent packages. Each package is assigned exactly one layer. A package may only depend on packages in lower-numbered layers (or share a layer for sibling type-only contracts). Tier metadata for each package lives in config/package-tiers.json — do not duplicate it here.

layers.name: contracts
layers.description: Type-only / zero-runtime-dep foundations. May not depend on any other @dzupagent package.

layers.name: foundation
layers.description: Core foundation built on contracts. May depend only on layer 0.

layers.name: domain
layers.description: Single-purpose domain capabilities. May depend on layers 0–1.

layers.name: orchestration
layers.description: Agent runtime and orchestration. May depend on layers 0–2.

layers.name: composition
layers.description: Composition and adapter packages that bind multiple orchestration units. May depend on layers 0–3.

layers.name: host
layers.description: Host runtimes. Top of the dependency graph; nothing may depend on this layer.

layers.name: tooling
layers.description: Parked / tooling packages. Tier-1 and tier-2 packages MUST NOT take a runtime dependency on any tooling package. Tooling packages may depend on lower numbered layers but must never appear upstream of supported product packages.
